title: Aporum shipmanii
taxonomy: Aporum shipmanii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid native to New Guinea. The classification of Aporum shipmanii places it within the genus Aporum, which is a group of orchids commonly found in tropical regions. The family Orchidaceae is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 species. intro: Aporum shipmanii, also known as the Mountain Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
